content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the three pending nearby-work amendments. Related-work selection no longer filters candidates to the active milestone, so cross-milestone label/subsystem owners can appear as canonical Nearby work IDs while short aliases remain guarded by the existing same-milestone routing logic. Direct dependencies/dependents now remain renderable from relation or summary fallback data when detail refresh fails or is capped, using fetched detail only to refine status/title/description when available. `project create-from-bead` now degrades ordinary `br list` IO/exit failures to empty supplemental summaries while keeping corrupt/parse failures fatal.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the create-from-bead prompt hydration path, nearby detail refresh/budget rendering, related-work selection, and existing routing alias behavior.
1. [Completed] Kept corrupt `br list` records fatal while allowing ordinary `br list` failures to degrade to empty nearby summary context so task creation can continue from `br show` direct bead data.
2. [Completed] Removed active-milestone filtering from related-work candidate selection and preserved the same-milestone restriction only in short alias handling.
3. [Completed] Changed direct relation rendering to preserve dependency/dependent entries from relation or summary fallback data when detail refresh is unavailable or capped, while still honoring loaded detail status when present.
4. [Completed] Updated focused regression tests for br-list degradation, cross-milestone related work, direct relation fallback rendering, and corrupt br-list fatal behavior.
5. [Completed] Ran focused and full repository validation gates, including the authoritative Nix build.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_includes_foreign_milestone_related_work --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_with_refresh_preserves_direct_relation_fallbacks --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_degrades_when_br_list_is_unavailable --test cli` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_allows_unknown_relation_status_fallback_when_br_list_is_unavailable --test cli` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub load_nearby_dependency_details_preserves_failed_and_capped_direct_fallbacks --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_fails_when_br_list_reports_corrupt_bead_data --test cli` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
